data.keyword: buy mini himalayan salt massage kit in bulk for spa

result.keyword: buy mini himalayan salt massage kit in bulk for spa

items.markdown:
For your spa's bulk needs, you can find mini Himalayan salt massage kits through professional beauty suppliers and wholesale marketplaces. Options range from small-item bulk packs (e.g., sets of 24 balls or 36 hearts) to full professional treatment room setups that include heaters.[[1]](https://www.faire.com/product/p_sm6ek8h7mm#:~:text=Saltability%20/,:%200.62%20kg%20%281.38%20lb%29)

**Professional & Wholesale Suppliers** 

- **[SpiritualQuest Wholesale](https://www.spiritualquest.com/wholesale/)** : Offers significant discounts for bulk orders on massage stones and lamps. They explicitly provide quantity discounts for massage practices.
- **[Himalayan Secrets](https://himalayansecrets.com/collections/massage-stones)** : Ideal for specific shapes in bulk.
	- **[Massage Ball (30 mm) - Pack of 24](https://himalayansecrets.com/products/massage-ball-30-mm-set-of-24?variant=36861938925736&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : $75.95 per pack.
	- **[Heart Stone (Small) - Pack of 12](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:17380895658973322252,gpcid:7963458602872092600,headlineOfferDocid:6984697193148472621,catalogid:5541873723467052991,productDocid:5208994594228938644&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiV6eaKoqSTAxXSR_EDHXNWFK0Qxa4PegQIBBAI)** : $55.95 per pack.
- **[Faire (Saltability)](https://www.faire.com/product/p_sm6ek8h7mm)** : Features the Wholesale Himalayan Salt Stone Starter Kit for $28.95 (MSRP) with a $100 minimum order, making it accessible for small-to-medium spas.
- **[Alibaba (Khanan International Traders)](https://www.alibaba.com/product-detail/Wholesale-Bulk-Cheap-Price-Spa-Skin_11000032601974.html)** : For large-scale procurement, they offer heart-shaped stones with a **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) of 50 pieces** at approximately $33.50 for the bulk lot.[[1]](https://www.faire.com/product/p_sm6ek8h7mm#:~:text=Saltability%20/,:%200.62%20kg%20%281.38%20lb%29)[[2]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/wholesale/#:~:text=Bath%20Salts%20-%20SpiritualQuest-,Wholesale%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Lamps%20-%20Tea%20Lights%20-%20Massage%20Stones%20-%20Gourmet,535-2267%20for%20help%20today.)[[3]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/product/himalayan-salt-massage-stones-12-stones/#:~:text=I%20HAVE%20A%20MASSAGE%20PRACTICE,repeat%20business%20and%20new%20clients.)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8646891613056085434,catalogid:1564540375459188242,gpcid:12506888132724863307&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://himalayansecrets.com/collections/massage-stones#:~:text=Massage%20Ball%20%2850%20mm%29%20-,$55.95)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13180395731157610669&ibp=oshop)

**Complete Spa Treatment Room Kits** 

If you are setting up new treatment rooms, these kits include specialized warmers:

- **[Saltability Treatment Room Starter Kit](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/)** from Massage Warehouse : $685. Includes an eco-friendly LED warmer, 18 assorted stones, and a 7-day timer for automated spa operations.
- **[Salt Stone Travel Bag with 12 Stones](https://spabodyworkmarket.com/products/salt-stone-travel-bag-large-12-stones?currency=USD&variant=50782222614810&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=Google%20Shopping&stkn=0df999d85fc0)** from [Spa & Bodywork Market](https://spabodyworkmarket.com/products/salt-stone-travel-bag-large-12-stones?currency=USD&variant=50782222614810&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=Google%20Shopping&stkn=0df999d85fc0) : $335. A portable option with an adjustable thermostat and 12 assorted pink and gray stones.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13463837961572534124&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13463837961572534124&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.faire.com/product/p_sm6ek8h7mm#:~:text=Saltability%20/,:%200.62%20kg%20%281.38%20lb%29)[[5]](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/bamboo-warming-tray-with-20-stones#:~:text=Features%20&%20Benefits%20-%20Heated%20Himalayan%20salt,on/ready%20and%20emitting%20negative%20ions%20all%20day.)

**Bulk Savings on Individual Kits** 

For retail or individual room replenishment, certain marketplaces offer tiered pricing:

- **Etsy (NaturesArtifactsUSA)** : Often runs discounts (e.g., 49.95USD $37.46) on 11-piece healing kits.
- **[eBay Bulk Savings](https://www.ebay.com/itm/185591433937)** : Some sellers offer "Buy more, save more" deals, such as 6-piece kits dropping from $34.75 to **$29.54 each** when buying 4 or more.[[1]](https://www.ebay.com/itm/185591433937#:~:text=$34.75/ea,7$29.54/ea$29.54%20each)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9603122939181755113&ibp=oshop)

Would you like to find specialized **heaters or warming bowls** to go with these bulk stones?
